content: Investigate backfill: confirmed working correctly with synthetic data
Fix DELETE /listings/{id} to also clean up closet item link
Fix update_item: reset source/auto_listing_id when intent reverts to 'own'
Add api.backfillMarketplaceListings to frontend api lib
Add 'Sync marketplace' button + 'Remove listing' button in MyListings
Add 'Remove listing' button in ListingDetail (owner view)
Run backend testing agent to validate end-to-end
